chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 692 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.10.2025. Applicant present in person. Respondents No.4 to 7 present in person. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State alongwith Inspector Syed Shahanshah SHO PS Jamal Shah. = Mr. Zeeshan Ali Memon, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant, taken on record. The report filed by the SHO PS Jamal Shah is also taken on record. Meanwhile, the applicant who is also present in person submits that he has engaged a fresh counsel to supersede his previous counsel. He submits that he does not wish to press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application. In view of the above statement of applicant as well as his counsel, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as withdrawn. Orders passed accordingly. JUDGE Tufail
